---
title: "Week 12: Package hackathon"
summary: "Use the hackathon week to finish, polish, and troubleshoot your final package work in teams."
prepare: "Bring your package backlog, open issues, and final integration tasks to the workshop."
resource_label: "Assignment 3"
resource_url: "assignments/A3.html"
focus:
  - "Finish and polish the final package"
  - "Work in teams with feedback available in the room"
  - "Resolve blockers before final submission"
  - "Use the session as dedicated integration time"
---

```{r}
week <- 12
source(here::here("course_info.R"))
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_week_overview(week)
```

This will be a time to work together on your final packages in groups. Rob and Krisanat will be available for consultation.

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_assignments(week)
```
